title: Elbow Grease Antibacterial Wipes | Kills Cold & Flu Viruses (Kills 99.9% of Bacteria) - Lemon (80 pack)
features: KILLS 99.9% OF BACTERIA: Elbow Grease Antibacterial Wipes provide a hygienic deep clean, killing bacteria that can linger on surfaces. Perfect for wiping down kitchen counters or bathroom surfaces, they ensure your home or work stays safe and sanitised.

BIODEGRADABLE & PLASTIC-FREE: Each wipe is designed to break down naturally, helping to reduce waste and protect the environment. Made without plastic, these wipes let you clean your home responsibly, so you can feel good about every wipe.

80 WIPES PER PACK: Each pack includes 80 wipes, giving you plenty to tackle messes big and small. Keep a pack under the sink or in the glove box for cleaning emergencies and enjoy a long-lasting supply of freshness.

MULTIPURPOSE SURFACE WIPES: From kitchen worktops to bathroom tiles and even furniture, these wipes tackle multiple cleaning tasks. Use them around the home or take them on-the-go for a quick clean in the car or office.

CONVENIENT RESEALABLE PACK: The handy resealable pack keeps wipes moist and ready for action, every time you need them. Store easily in cupboards or bags and prevent the wipes from drying out between uses.
description: Product Description Elbow Grease Antibacterial Wipes are the ultimate solution for every household cleaning need. Packed with power, these plastic-free, biodegradable wipes are tough on germs yet kind to the planet. Designed to kill 99.9% of bacteria, they’re ideal for keeping your home hygienically spotless. Perfect for use on hobs, worktops, and furniture, these multipurpose wet wipes make cleaning quick and convenient in any room of your home. Each resealable pack includes 80 wipes, ensuring you always have a fresh wipe ready for action. Available in refreshing lemon or grapefruit scents, Elbow Grease wipes are an essential for every home, car, or office, helping you tackle life’s messes with ease and confidence. With Elbow Grease Antibacterial Wipes, deep cleaning becomes a breeze. From quick kitchen wipe-downs to full household cleans, these cleaning wipes are the go-to tool for anyone who values a tidy, germ-free space. The eco-friendly design means you can get a powerful clean without adding plastic waste to the planet. Choose Elbow Grease and discover the easy way to keep your home fresh and bacteria-free, day in and day out. Ingredients Didecyldimethyl Ammonium Chloride (0.5% w/w), <5% Anionic Surfactants, Non-Ionic Surfactants, Disinfectants, Parfum, Limonene. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. See more

Brand.title: Cooraby Toss and Catch Paddle Game Disc 4 Set Paddle Toss and Catch Ball Sport Game Suitable for Sports, Beach and Party Favor with Storage Bag, 8 Paddles and 8 Balls (15.5cm)
features: Size: the size of each paddle is 6.1 inches/15.5 cm in diameter, the sticky ball is 1.8 inches/4.5 cm in diameter, and the soft ball is 2.48 inches/6.3 cm in diameter, mini sizes can meet your need; the bag is 36 cm in length and 25 cm in width, very suitable for you to hold the paddles and balls inside

Material: the paddle with black edge adopts quality plastic and nylon, light in weight, sturdy and durable, and not easy to deform or damage, you can catch balls easily; the hard ball is made of plastic, cement, rubber and nylon, while the soft ball is made of sponge and cloth, you can feel free to use them

Quantity: you will receive 4 sets of toss and catch ball game tools, 2 paddles, 1 sticky ball, 1 soft ball for each set, in total of 8 paddles, 4 sticky balls, 4 soft balls, enough for you to play and share with your friends, family; we also provide you with 1 black drawstring bag to hold them inside for easy storage and carrying

How to play: the paddle and the ball is very sticky, easy for you to get the ball; hold a paddle in your hand and try to catch the ball your partner throw into you, very fun indeed; each paddle attaches with an adjustable strap that can be adjusted according to your hand sizes, suitable for most people

Wide range of uses: the toss and catch ball set is suitable for beaches, gardens, parks, yards, school, where you can play the game with your family, friends, classmates to have much fun and share a memorable time
